While lifting a 35-16 carton from a lower pallet at the loading dock. + on a wet spot near Bay 3 and slipped. I twisted my right knee and fell forward, bracing my fall with my left hand, causing a wrist sprain. Spill appeared to be water tracked in from the dock area. Incident was reported to my supervisor immediately and first aid was provided .
